violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Service call placed during inspection. 3-bay sink is to be utilized to sanitize until dishwasher is serviced and reaching proper sanitizing temperatures. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

Pasta, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Pasta observed with temperature of 45 degrees F and was voluntarily disposed of during inspection. Proper cooling methods reviewed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
Knife observed to be stored between the prep unit and prep table. Utensils are to be stored in a clean, dry location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

The cutting board of the prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2024
